summary:
We are evaluating whether α-CGRP has amyloidogenic properties. None of the retrieved evidence demonstrates that α-CGRP forms amyloid aggregates or undergoes misfolding, unlike known amyloidogenic peptides such as amyloid-beta.  
\boxed{B}
